name: ai-interview-simulator
description: AI-powered interview preparation platform: resume analysis, personalized mock interviews, rubric-based evaluation, and improvement plans.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/types && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.build:api: npm run build -w packages/types && npm run build -w apps/api
scripts.build:web: npm run build -w packages/types && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/types && npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/api && npm run lint -w apps/web
